description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a flat roof and a modern, boxy architectural style. The exterior features red brick walls, large rectangular windows, and a simple, geometric layout. The property is enclosed by a brick wall and includes a landscaped garden with trees, shrubs, and paved walkways. The front facade has a main entry door, a garage door, and several windows, while the rear and side facades open onto a private garden area. The roof appears accessible and flat, with some visible skylights or roof windows. The overall design is functional and contemporary, with minimal decorative elements.
description: A modern, two-story brick house with a flat roof, large windows, and a walled garden featuring trees and paved paths.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, garage door, and a partial view of the interior layout with a flat roof and garden behind.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick boundary wall, landscaped garden with trees, and multiple windows on the house's facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the private garden, large windows, and the surrounding greenery and fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garden, dense trees, and the house's side windows and flat roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with no porch, flat entry, and minimal decorative elements; includes a garage door.
